heading: Imposition of tax
label: 3321 Imposition of tax
notes: References in TextSection 10(d) of the Railroad Unemployment Insurance Act, referred to in subsec. (c)(1), is classified to , Railroads.section 360(d) of Title 45

L. 100–647, title VII, § 7106(b)102 Stat. 3773Nov. 10, 1988“(1).—In generalIn the case of any calendar month beginning before —January 1, 1991“(A)there shall be substituted for ‘4 percent’ in subsections (a) and (b) of section 3321 of the 1986 Code the percentage equal to the sum of—“(i)4 percent, plus“(ii)the surtax rate (if any) for such calendar month, and“(B)subsection (c) of such section shall not apply to so much of the tax imposed by such section as is attributable to the surtax rate.“(2).—Surtax rateFor purposes of paragraph (1), the surtax rate shall be—“(A)3.5 percent for each month during a calendar year if, as of September 30, of the preceding calendar year, there was a balance of transfers (or unpaid interest thereon) made after , to the railroad unemployment insurance account under section 10(d) of the Railroad Unemployment Insurance Act [], andSeptember 30, 198545 U.S.C. 360(d)“(B)zero for any other calendar month.”

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: There is hereby imposed on every rail employer for each calendar month an excise tax, with respect to having individuals in his employ, equal to 4 percent of the total rail wages paid by him during such month.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is hereby imposed on the income of each employee representative a tax equal to 4 percent of the rail wages paid to him during the calendar month.

children.heading: Determination of wages
children.label: 2 Determination of wages
children.text: The rail wages of an employee representative for purposes of paragraph (1) shall be determined in the same manner and with the same effect as if the employee organization by which such employee representative is employed were a rail employer.

children.heading: Termination if loans to railroad unemployment fund repaid
children.label: c Termination if loans to railroad unemployment fund repaid

children.text: no balance of transfers made before , to the railroad unemployment insurance account under section 10(d) of the Railroad Unemployment Insurance Act, andOctober 1, 1985
no unpaid interest on such transfers.
